title: 「Despite 句」句型

omissions: The Important Rules and Benefits explanations are provided in Chinese only; their English fields are faithful editorial translations.
The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

formula: Despite + noun / noun phrase / verb-ing phrase, subject + verb + other information

formulas.formula: Despite + noun / noun phrase / verb-ing phrase, subject + verb + other information

formulas.labelEn: Despite in the middle or at the end
formulas.formula: Subject + verb + other information + despite + noun / noun phrase / verb-ing phrase

example: Despite the unexpected situation, we still proceeded to hold the meeting with the client.
exampleZh: 儘管出現了意外情況，我們仍然照常與客戶開會。

examples.en: Despite the unexpected situation, we still proceeded to hold the meeting with the client.
examples.zh: 儘管出現了意外情況，我們仍然照常與客戶開會。
examples.highlight: Despite the unexpected situation, we still proceeded to hold the meeting with the client.

rules.en: Despite must be followed by a noun, noun phrase or verb-ing phrase.
rules.zh: Despite 後面要接名詞、名詞詞組或 verb-ing 詞組。

rules.en: Despite cannot be followed directly by a complete sentence.
rules.zh: Despite 後面不可直接接完整句子。
examples: Correct: Despite the rain, we went out.
Incorrect: Despite it was raining, we went out.

rules.en: Still may be used, but it is not required.
rules.zh: still 可以使用，但不是必須。
examples: Despite the rain, we still went out.

benefits.en: It clearly places the meaning “there is a difficulty, but something still happens” in one sentence.
benefits.zh: 它可以把「有困難，但事情仍然發生」的意思清楚地放在同一句中。

benefits.en: It gives the sentence more variety than using only but, making writing and speaking sound more natural.
benefits.zh: 它令句子比只使用 but 更有變化，寫作和說話亦會顯得更自然。

benefits.en: It helps students learn to turn a complete sentence into a noun or verb-ing phrase, building more flexible sentence structures.
benefits.zh: 它能幫助學生學會把完整句子改成名詞或 verb-ing 詞組，從而建立更靈活的句子結構。

sourceOmissions: The Important Rules and Benefits explanations are provided in Chinese only; their English fields are faithful editorial translations.
The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

en: Rewrite each sentence using despite while keeping the original meaning.
Use a noun, noun phrase, or verb-ing phrase after despite.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 despite 改寫以下句子，並保持原意不變。
在 despite 後使用名詞、名詞詞組或 verb-ing 詞組。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Although the weather was cold, we went for a walk.
questions.promptZh: 雖然天氣寒冷，但我們仍然去散步。
questions.answer: Despite the cold weather, we went for a walk.
questions.answerZh: 儘管天氣寒冷，我們仍然去散步。
questions.highlight: Despite the cold weather, we went for a walk.

questions.prompt: Lily felt tired, but she finished her homework.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉感到疲倦，但她仍然完成了功課。
questions.answer: Lily finished her homework despite feeling tired.
questions.answerZh: 儘管感到疲倦，莉莉仍然完成了功課。
questions.highlight: Lily finished her homework despite feeling tired.

questions.prompt: Even though it was raining, Ben rode his bicycle to school.
questions.promptZh: 即使正在下雨，本仍然踏單車上學。
questions.answer: Despite the rain, Ben rode his bicycle to school.
questions.answerZh: 儘管下着雨，本仍然踏單車上學。
questions.highlight: Despite the rain, Ben rode his bicycle to school.

questions.prompt: Emma was nervous, but she smiled at the audience.
questions.promptZh: 艾瑪感到緊張，但她仍然向觀眾微笑。
questions.answer: Emma smiled at the audience despite being nervous.
questions.answerZh: 儘管感到緊張，艾瑪仍然向觀眾微笑。
questions.highlight: Emma smiled at the audience despite being nervous.

questions.prompt: Was the queue long? Yes, but I still waited for the bus.
questions.promptZh: 隊伍很長嗎？是的，但我仍然等候巴士。
questions.answer: Despite the long queue, I waited for the bus.
questions.answerZh: 儘管隊伍很長，我仍然等候巴士。
questions.highlight: Despite the long queue, I waited for the bus.

questions.prompt: Although Jack had a headache, he went to work.
questions.promptZh: 雖然傑克頭痛，但他仍然上班。
questions.answer: Jack went to work despite having a headache.
questions.answerZh: 儘管頭痛，傑克仍然上班。
questions.highlight: Jack went to work despite having a headache.

questions.prompt: The question was difficult, but the students kept trying.
questions.promptZh: 題目很困難，但學生仍然繼續嘗試。
questions.answer: Despite the difficult question, the students kept trying.
questions.answerZh: 儘管題目很困難，學生仍然繼續嘗試。
questions.highlight: Despite the difficult question, the students kept trying.

questions.prompt: Although the wind is strong, we can still enjoy the picnic.
questions.promptZh: 雖然風勢強勁，但我們仍然可以享受野餐。
questions.answer: We can still enjoy the picnic despite the strong wind.
questions.answerZh: 儘管風勢強勁，我們仍然可以享受野餐。
questions.highlight: We can still enjoy the picnic despite the strong wind.

questions.prompt: Mr Chan had a busy schedule, yet he attended the school event.
questions.promptZh: 陳先生的日程繁忙，但他仍然出席了學校活動。
questions.answer: Despite his busy schedule, Mr Chan attended the school event.
questions.answerZh: 儘管日程繁忙，陳先生仍然出席了學校活動。
questions.highlight: Despite his busy schedule, Mr Chan attended the school event.

questions.prompt: Although Mia arrived home late, she cooked dinner.
questions.promptZh: 雖然米婭很晚才回家，但她仍然煮了晚餐。
questions.answer: Mia cooked dinner despite arriving home late.
questions.answerZh: 儘管很晚才回家，米婭仍然煮了晚餐。
questions.highlight: Mia cooked dinner despite arriving home late.

questions.prompt: Was the coat expensive? Yes, but Sarah still bought it.
questions.promptZh: 這件外套昂貴嗎？是的，但莎拉仍然買下了它。
questions.answer: Despite the high price, Sarah bought the coat.
questions.answerZh: 儘管價格高昂，莎拉仍然買下了這件外套。
questions.highlight: Despite the high price, Sarah bought the coat.

questions.prompt: The weather was hot, but the team completed the match.
questions.promptZh: 天氣炎熱，但球隊仍然完成了賽事。
questions.answer: The team completed the match despite the hot weather.
questions.answerZh: 儘管天氣炎熱，球隊仍然完成了賽事。
questions.highlight: The team completed the match despite the hot weather.

questions.prompt: Even though Leo did not know the answer, he raised his hand.
questions.promptZh: 即使里奧不知道答案，他仍然舉手。
questions.answer: Despite not knowing the answer, Leo raised his hand.
questions.answerZh: 儘管不知道答案，里奧仍然舉手。
questions.highlight: Despite not knowing the answer, Leo raised his hand.

questions.prompt: There was a lot of noise outside, but Chloe continued reading.
questions.promptZh: 外面十分嘈吵，但克洛伊仍然繼續閱讀。
questions.answer: Chloe continued reading despite the noise outside.
questions.answerZh: 儘管外面十分嘈吵，克洛伊仍然繼續閱讀。

questions.prompt: Although Nina was afraid of dogs, she helped the lost puppy.
questions.promptZh: 雖然妮娜害怕狗，但她仍然幫助了迷路的小狗。
questions.answer: Despite being afraid of dogs, Nina helped the lost puppy.
questions.answerZh: 儘管害怕狗，妮娜仍然幫助了迷路的小狗。

questions.prompt: Although David felt tired, he could climb the stairs.

questions.prompt: Was the train delayed? Yes, but Olivia arrived before the meeting began.
questions.promptZh: 火車延誤了嗎？是的，但奧莉花仍然在會議開始前到達。

questions.prompt: Ethan has very little storage space, but he keeps his bedroom tidy.

questions.prompt: Ava received the invitation at short notice, yet she attended the wedding.

questions.highlight: The patient should follow the treatment plan despite not seeing immediate results.

questions.prompt: The new employee had received little training but handled the customer enquiry politely.
questions.promptZh: 這名新僱員只接受了少量培訓，但仍然有禮貌地處理顧客查詢。
questions.answer: Despite having received little training, the new employee handled the customer enquiry politely.

questions.prompt: Did strong winds stop the outdoor concert? No—the concert continued even though the winds damaged some decorations.
questions.promptZh: 強風令戶外音樂會停止嗎？沒有——即使強風損壞了一些裝飾，音樂會仍然繼續。
questions.answer: The outdoor concert continued despite strong winds that damaged some decorations.
questions.answerZh: 儘管強風損壞了一些裝飾，戶外音樂會仍然繼續。
questions.highlight: The outdoor concert continued despite strong winds that damaged some decorations.

questions.prompt: Although the written instructions were clear, several users installed the software incorrectly.
questions.promptZh: 雖然書面指示清晰，但數名使用者仍然錯誤安裝了軟件。
questions.answer: Despite the clear written instructions, several users installed the software incorrectly.
questions.answerZh: 儘管書面指示清晰，數名使用者仍然錯誤安裝了軟件。
questions.highlight: Despite the clear written instructions, several users installed the software incorrectly.

questions.prompt: Even though the community centre moved many activities online, it remained busy.
questions.promptZh: 即使社區中心把很多活動移至網上進行，中心仍然十分繁忙。
questions.answer: The community centre remained busy despite moving many activities online.
questions.answerZh: 儘管把很多活動移至網上進行，社區中心仍然十分繁忙。
questions.highlight: The community centre remained busy despite moving many activities online.

questions.prompt: Although the committee did not agree with every proposal, it approved the main plan.
questions.promptZh: 雖然委員會並不同意每項建議，但仍然通過了主要計劃。
questions.answer: Despite not agreeing with every proposal, the committee approved the main plan.
questions.answerZh: 儘管並不同意每項建議，委員會仍然通過了主要計劃。
questions.highlight: Despite not agreeing with every proposal, the committee approved the main plan.

questions.prompt: The scientists had encountered several unexpected technical problems. Even so, they continued the experiment.
questions.promptZh: 科學家遇上了數項意料之外的技術問題。即使如此，他們仍然繼續進行實驗。
questions.answer: The scientists continued the experiment despite having encountered several unexpected technical problems.
questions.answerZh: 儘管遇上了數項意料之外的技術問題，科學家仍然繼續進行實驗。
questions.highlight: The scientists continued the experiment despite having encountered several unexpected technical problems.
